entries.title: Genesis 1:27
entries.author: R. A. Torrey (editor)
entries.content:
1 The first Sabbath. 4 Further particulars concerning the manner of creation. 8 The planting of the garden of Eden, and its situation; 15 man is placed in it; and the tree of knowledge only forbidden. 18 The animals are named by Adam. 21 The making of woman, and the institution of marriage.

Thus. 4; 1:1,10; Ex 20:11; 31:17; 2Ki 19:15; 2Ch 2:12; Ne 9:6; Job 12:9 Ps 89:11-13; 104:2; 136:5-8; 146:6; Isa 42:5; 45:18; 48:13; 55:9 Isa 65:17; Jer 10:12,16; Zec 12:1; Ac 4:24; Heb 4:3 host. De 4:19; 17:3; 2Ki 21:3-5; Ps 33:6,9; Isa 34:4; 40:26-28; 45:12 Jer 8:2; Lu 2:13; Ac 7:42
